title: Enhancement Ideas Log
organization: Two Marshalls Studios - Studio Operating System (TMS-OS)
summary: Preserves deferred enhancement ideas from the beginning of the project without interrupting approved work.

sections.title: Purpose
paragraphs: This document is the permanent Enhancement Ideas Log for Two Marshalls Studios. It preserves future improvement ideas without allowing them to interrupt the current approved work path. Enhancement ideas are captured, categorized, deferred when needed, and reviewed later under a controlled process.

sections.title: Permanent Rule
paragraphs: Enhancement ideas must be captured from the beginning of the project, not only from the date this log was created.
The log exists so valuable ideas are not lost, but also so the active foundation build is not derailed by unrelated improvements.

sections.title: How Enhancement Ideas Are Handled
items: Capture the idea as soon as it appears.
Do not build the idea during the current work session unless Stephen explicitly approves it.
Record the idea with a clear title, description, source, priority, status, and related records.
Keep the current work-session goal focused.
Review the Enhancement Ideas Log later during planning, roadmap, or dedicated enhancement sessions.

sections.title: Historical Baseline Enhancements
paragraphs: The following enhancement records are recovered from the existing TMS-OS backup and become the starting baseline for the permanent Enhancement Ideas Log.

sections.title: ENH-2026-0001 - Google Drive Publishing
paragraphs: Department: Documentation
Status: Deferred
Priority: High
Summary: Publish structured documentation into the future Google Drive documentation hierarchy.
Source / Notes: Recovered StudioDB enhancement record.

sections.title: ENH-2026-0002 - Interactive Documentation Forms
paragraphs: Department: Documentation
Status: Deferred
Priority: Medium
Summary: Allow records to be added through the Studio Portal interface.
Source / Notes: Recovered StudioDB enhancement record.

sections.title: ENH-2026-0003 - Command Palette
paragraphs: Department: Core Architecture
Status: Deferred
Priority: Medium
Summary: Add a command palette for fast navigation and studio actions.
Source / Notes: Recovered StudioDB enhancement record.

sections.title: New Enhancement Captured During Google Documentation Recovery
ENH-2026-0004 - Automated Work Session Closeout and Google Documentation Publishing
paragraphs: Department: Documentation / Core Architecture
Status: Deferred
Priority: High

Summary: Create a controlled end-of-session process that reviews the session, updates records, generates formatted documents, places them in the correct Google folder, updates current state, and records the next action.
Source / Notes: Captured from Stephen clarification during Google documentation recovery. Do not build until the current recovery foundation is complete.

rows: The idea has been recorded but not evaluated.
The idea is valuable but not part of the current approved work.
The idea is being evaluated for timing, scope, and risk.
The idea has been approved for a future work session or roadmap item.
The idea was reviewed and intentionally declined.
The idea has been implemented, tested, documented, and closed.

sections.title: Required Fields for Future Enhancement Records
items: Related decisions, standards, procedures, bugs, lessons, or technical debt
Owner or review area if known

sections.title: Current Enhancement Backlog
paragraphs: This is the current recovered backlog. It should be expanded as more historical enhancement ideas are recovered and as new ideas appear during future sessions.

paragraphs: Status: Deferred

Next Review Action: Review after local documentation package and Google document recovery are stable.

paragraphs: Status: Deferred

sections.title: ENH-2026-0004 - Automated Work Session Closeout and Google Documentation Publishing
paragraphs: Status: Deferred
Priority: High
Next Review Action: Review after the 16-document recovery/population process is complete.

sections.title: Relationship to Current Work
paragraphs: This log does not authorize building enhancements immediately. It protects the current foundation work by giving every good idea a safe place to live until it can be reviewed. The current active path remains the Google documentation recovery and permanent document population process.

sections.title: Completion Checklist
items: Historical enhancements recovered from available backup material.
Current enhancement idea captured and deferred.

sections.title: Permanent Statement
paragraphs: Two Marshalls Studios will preserve enhancement ideas from the beginning of the project forward. Ideas will be captured, organized, and reviewed later without interrupting the current approved work-session path.
Two Marshalls Studios | TMS-OS Permanent Documentation
